channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kazuma Okamoto ties Shohei Ohtani's rookie HR record with game-winning blast
item.description: Kazuma Okamoto hit his 22nd home run of the season, tying Japanese-born rookie legend Shohei Ohtani's MLB record, to lead the Toronto Blue Jays to a 5-3 victory over the San Diego Padres. The three-ru...

item.title: Dauphin Hospital Closure Sparks Concerns Over Access to Healthcare
item.description: Residents of Dauphin, Manitoba, are expressing significant anxiety over the closure of their local hospital due to a flooded basement, which has left them without immediate access to medical care. The...

item.title: Ronaldo's Decline and Messi's Rise: A Fan's Perspective on Football Icons
item.description: This article reflects on Cristiano Ronaldo's career trajectory, highlighting his legendary achievements at Real Madrid and Juventus, while critically examining his struggles in the 2026 FIFA World Cup...

item.title: Supreme Court's Addendum Confirms Ram's Birthplace in Ayodhya Using Religious Texts
item.description: The Supreme Court's addendum, authored by one of the five judges on the Ayodhya Bench, references religious texts like the Ain-i-Akbari (a 16th-century Mughal administrative document) and the Bala Kan...

item.title: Military Officers Detained Over Alleged Coup Plot Face Access Restrictions Amid Torture Claims in Court Martial
item.description: A court-martial has sparked controversy as the Defence Intelligence Agency (DIA) barred lawyers and family members from visiting military officers detained over an alleged coup plot against President ...

item.title: Stratbase Advocates Upholding Arbitral Ruling in South China Sea Code Talks
item.description: Stratbase Institute President Victor Andres 'Dindo' Manhit called on the Philippines to ensure the 2016 South China Sea arbitral ruling remains the legal foundation for future Code of Conduct negotiat...

item.title: Tragedy in Kiambu: 27-Year-Old Mother Alleged to Kill 2-Year-Old Child
item.description: A 27-year-old woman named Sylvia Wanjiru is alleged to have killed her two-year-old child in Chura Village, Gatundu South, Kiambu County. The incident occurred on Saturday evening when the mother repo...

item.title: Brenda Marshall: A Graceful Icon of 1940s Hollywood Cinema
item.description: Brenda Marshall (1915–1992) was a prominent American actress celebrated for her striking beauty and poised performances in 1940s Hollywood films. Born Ardis Ankerson to a Norwegian-American family in ...

item.title: Lizzo Confronts Allegations and Fame's Impact: A Journey Through Criticism and Resilience
item.description: The article explores Lizzo's response to allegations of misconduct by former dancers, which led to significant public scrutiny and career challenges. After a successful 2023 tour, three dancers accuse...

item.title: Oyo Governor Prioritizes Reuniting and Rehabilitating Rescued Pupils, Teachers
item.description: Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, has emphasized that his administration will prioritize the reunion and rehabilitation of pupils and teachers rescued after being held captive for 56 days. In a post o...

item.title: Celebrating First Nations dance pioneer Michael Leslie's legacy
item.description: Beyond the Tracks is an autobiographical performance that chronicles the life and artistic contributions of Kamilaroi/Mandandanji dancer, choreographer, and cultural leader Michael Leslie. The show bl...

item.title: Moroccan Cookbook Features Honey-Buttered Pancakes and Other Dishes
item.description: The article highlights Nargisse Benkabbou's second cookbook, 'Madaq,' which celebrates Moroccan cuisine through accessible recipes. Benkabbou, a London-based chef of Moroccan heritage, emphasizes the ...

item.title: Ruto's Daughter Graduates from Dubai University as Deputy Governor Grieves Over Lost Sons
item.description: The article covers multiple stories. First, President William Ruto's daughter, Cullie, recently graduated with a Bachelor of Arts in Interior Architecture and Design from Heriot-Watt University Dubai....

item.title: Typhoon Inday's Impact on Southwest Monsoon Persists Despite Exiting PAR
item.description: Typhoon Inday (Bavi) has exited the Philippine Area of Responsibility (PAR) but continues to influence the southwest monsoon, leading to persistent heavy rainfall and strong winds across multiple regi...

item.title: At least 17 dead in Mindanao due to enhanced southwest monsoon and typhoon
item.description: The National Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Council (NDRRMC) reported at least 17 deaths caused by the enhanced southwest monsoon (habagat), intensified by Typhoon Inday (Bavi). The disaster p...

item.title: Nigeria Conducts Successful Rescue of Abducted Schoolchildren and Teachers in Oyo
item.description: Security forces in Nigeria's Oyo state have successfully rescued 39 schoolchildren and six teachers who were kidnapped by gunmen nearly two months ago. The abduction occurred on May 15 when armed assa...

item.title: Lagos residents navigate flood chaos: livelihoods lost, resilience found
item.description: Floods in Lagos have left a trail of destruction, wiping out homes, businesses, and livelihoods. While many families face the harsh reality of losing everything, others have turned to the crisis as an...

item.title: Afghan National Extradited to Face US Narcotics Charges
item.description: Abdul Zahir Qadeer, an Afghan national, has been extradited from Kenya to face narcotics charges in the United States following an Interpol Red Notice. The extradition process, concluded on July 9, 20...

item.title: Tanzania aims for Sh2trn in non-tax revenue from state assets
item.description: The Office of the Treasury Registrar (OTR) has set an ambitious target of 2 trillion shillings in non-tax revenue for the 2026/27 financial year, surpassing the government's projection of 1.79 trillio...

item.title: Newmarket's Chief Positivity Officer Boosts Community Morale During Pandemic
item.description: Jamie Boyle, a longtime customer service supervisor in Newmarket, Ontario, was appointed as the town's chief positivity officer during the COVID-19 pandemic. His role involved fostering optimism and m...
